datasets.name: whoscored_raw_runs
datasets.grain: one immutable source response per run and match

datasets.name: transfermarkt_raw_runs
datasets.grain: one immutable source response per run and player

datasets.name: whoscored_events
datasets.grain: one row per stable match-event ID

datasets.name: transfermarkt_players_and_valuations
datasets.grain: one row per player or player valuation date

datasets.name: player_source_mapping
datasets.grain: one approved one-to-one WhoScored-to-Transfermarkt player mapping

datasets.name: match_action_features
datasets.grain: one row per scored shot, pass, carry, or defensive action

datasets.name: player_match_ratings
datasets.grain: one immutable post-match rating per player-match and model version

datasets.name: rating_processing_state
datasets.grain: one source hash per processed match plus one current form row per player

datasets.name: valuation_model_features_and_predictions
datasets.grain: one labeled valuation interval or one current player scoring row

datasets.name: api_serving_tables
datasets.grain: player snapshot, valuation history row, or player-match impact row

datasets.name: historical_replay_results
datasets.grain: one row per chronologically replayed match
